title: derris philippinensis
intro: Derris philippinensis, also known as the Philippine rotenone, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant's roots and seeds contain rotenone, a natural insecticide, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Derris philippinensis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Derris philippinensis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
